title: byblidaceae
intro: The Byblidaceae rank refers to a family of plants. Byblidaceae is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the bee orchids or beehouse orchids, that are native to tropical regions of the world. They are known for their unique and often brightly colored flowers that are shaped like a beehive, which attracts pollinators such as bees. Byblidaceae family consists of approximately 10 species of plants.
